name: p1_ops_i64
drl:
rule "eq" when $p : P(n == 7) then insert(new Hit("eq", $p.getN())); end
rule "ne" when $p : P(n != 0) then insert(new Hit("ne", $p.getN())); end
rule "lt" when $p : P(n < 0) then insert(new Hit("lt", $p.getN())); end
rule "le" when $p : P(n <= 0) then insert(new Hit("le", $p.getN())); end
rule "gt" when $p : P(n > 7) then insert(new Hit("gt", $p.getN())); end
rule "ge" when $p : P(n >= 7) then insert(new Hit("ge", $p.getN())); end
rule "neg" when $p : P(n == -3) then insert(new Hit("neg", $p.getN())); end
